Interface ITemporalQueryFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage temporal query filters.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D0CEE203-56DA-11D5-AE49-00104BA2ABCC")]
public interface ITemporalQueryFilter

Properties

EndingDate

Indicates the latest date included in the query.

object EndingDate { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelativeTimeOperator

The object that contains a relative time to offset the temporal values.

ITemporalOperator RelativeTimeOperator { get; set; }

Property Value

ITemporalOperator

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartingDate

Indicates the earliest date included in the query.

object StartingDate { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

TemporalConversion

The temporal conversion mode to use (if any) by the temporal query.

enumTemporalConversion TemporalConversion { get; set; }

Property Value

enumTemporalConversion

Examples

Sample Snippet

TemporalOrder

Defines order in which temporal records are sorted.

enumTemporalOrder TemporalOrder { get; set; }

Property Value

enumTemporalOrder

Examples

Sample Snippet

TemporalRelationship

The temporal relation used in the temporal query.

enumTemporalRelation TemporalRelationship { get; set; }

Property Value

enumTemporalRelation
